title: Cloroxwipes110's Crafting Tweaks
description: Much needed changes to the rudimentary Minecraft crafting system
body:
## Cloroxwipes110's Crafting Tweaks

### Datapack information:
This datapack changes many crafting recipes that need to be changed. Check the gallery for some of the crafting recipes, and scroll down for all of the changed recipes. Lots of crafting recipes changed, adding new functionality to some items and allowing some other items to be crafted.

No configuration is needed for the datapack, however there is a slight change between version 1.0 and version 1.1 that you can see in the changelogs.

## Recipes:
New accurate stair crafting recipe,

![New stair crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/919a0d8e63b408246a400ce9b7356bb7314def6c.png)

New more accurate button crafting recipe,

![New button crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/677eab3c89036b789135d1149ad8aed0f521d028.png)

Faster way to craft arrows,

![Arrow Bundle Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4af94285451137d71eaaa7b47b938e6bc4fa8e4.png)

Shapeless bread, paper, tnt, shulker box, sea lantern, dark prismarine, calibrated sculk sensor, cookie, and more,

![Shapeless](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8a19c9ed01fae0ae8dd6f754097141936fc2947.png)

Craftable chainmail armor,

![Chainmail armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14732e190bacf22ddd50fd5253c8740faaa2fb45.png)

Unpackable ice, blue ice, wool, nether wart blocks, and dripstone blocks,

![Unpackable ice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17f23d66fb48bfa1da95ddcc0908bb349595eee0.png)

Normal loom,

![Normal loom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4743922b68935449f76a3c45f455b3e274c108e8.png)

Recyclable rotten flesh,

![Rotten flesh to Leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce03a7786aba15eb13df70a0a31021d777437664.png)

Craftable trident,

![Trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8af9fe36f5db056c6cd03ee1609c449ec8f28bd9.png)

And more!
